metadata.title: Local REST API with MCP
metadata.description: Get, change or otherwise interact with your notes in Obsidian via a REST API.

regex.source: text: "For example, the following request will return all notes in the root directory of your vault:"
regex.target: text: "例如，以下请求将返回保管库根目录中的所有笔记："

regex.source: Notice("Failed to read the daily note template")
regex.target: Notice("Failed to read the daily note template")

regex.source:
log() {
      return typeof console === "object" && console.log && Function.prototype.apply.call(console.log, console, arguments)
regex.target:
log() {

regex.source: .log("[REST API] Added new API extension", pluginManifest)
regex.target: .log("[REST API] Added new API extension", pluginManifest)

regex.target: .error(`Failed to read the daily note template '${templatePath}'`, err)

regex.target: description: "您想要获取定期记录的日期的年份。"

regex.target: description: "您想要获取定期记录的日期的月份 (1-12)。"

regex.target: description: "您想要获取定期记录的日期 (1-31)。"

regex.source: description: "How much context to return around the matching string"
regex.target: description: "返回匹配字符串周围的多少上下文"

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key, public key, and API key to be regenerated.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`按下此按钮将重新生成您的证书、
私钥、公钥和 API 密钥。
按下此按钮后，此设置面板将关闭。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key,  and public key to be re-generated, but your API key will remain unchanged. 
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`按下此按钮将重新生成您的证书、
私钥和公钥，但您的 API 密钥将保持不变。
按下此按钮后，此设置面板将关闭。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Pressing this button will reset this plugin's
        settings to defaults.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`按下此按钮将重置此插件的设置至默认设置。
按下此按钮后，此设置面板将关闭。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Advanced settings are dangerous and may make your environment less secure.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`高级设置很危险，可能会降低您的环境的安全性。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`
          This controls whether the HTTPs server is enabled.  You almost certainly want to leave this switch in its default state ('on'),
          but may find it useful to turn this switch off for
          troubleshooting.
        `)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`
          这控制是否启用 HTTPS 服务器。您几乎肯定希望将此开关保留为默认状态（“开启”），
但关闭此开关可能会对故障排除有所帮助。
        `)
